FCE-Omega functional integration report
=======================================
  UFME unit tests:               140
  FCE-Omega unit tests:          20
  FCE-Omega functional tests:    94
  total tests:                   254

Functional capability checks (PASS=True):
  observer active/passive invariance: True
  residue detected:                   True
  Omega irreversibility:              True
  advisory no-truth-override:         True
  multiperspectival normalization:    True
  provenance complete:                True
  persistence roundtrip:              True
  vendor layout clean:                True

Notes:
  - workload coag_count=1 Z_max=0.556 n_centers=2 hints=['coagulated_reference', 'high_residue', 'contested_expression']
  - Integration mode: SEMI-ACTIVE on priorities only (v0.5.1). fce_advisory_mode default 'read_only' preserves v0.5.0 byte exactly; 'priority_only' emits bounded FCEAdvisoryFeedback with full provenance. The runtime adapter, audit_log, slot zones and Omega registry are unchanged in either mode.
